data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick), but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for this capability, the evidence does not demonstrate that the system can effectively handle a switch in modality when a participant feels ill. Therefore, this step reveals a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to confirm the switching functionality is missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to switch modality from in-person to remote if a participant is sick.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
